scripts.format: pnpm --dir Frontend run format && node ./scripts/maven-runner.mjs spotless:apply
scripts.format:check: pnpm --dir Frontend run format:check && node ./scripts/maven-runner.mjs spotless:check
scripts.build: pnpm --dir Frontend run build && node ./scripts/maven-runner.mjs -DskipTests package
scripts.dev: node ./scripts/announce-and-wait.mjs "Starting frontend [0] and backend [1] development servers in 3 seconds..." 3000 && concurrently "pnpm --dir Frontend run dev" "pnpm run dev:backend"
